title: rubus hirtus subvar. glaciacus
intro: Rubus hirtus subvar. glaciacus, also known as the Arctic Raspberry or Mountain Raspberry, is a subspecies of the raspberry plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, including its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which contribute to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus subvar. glaciacus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to aid in the digestion of food. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
